recent_projects.name: cornserve
recent_projects.summary: Easy, fast, and scalable multimodal agentic AI
recent_projects.author: Cornserve Team

recent_projects.name: claude-collector
recent_projects.summary: Extract and sanitize Claude Code conversation data for training datasets

recent_projects.name: openmarkets
recent_projects.summary: OpenMarkets is a modular Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that unifies access to financial market data for AI, research, and quantitative finance. It offers robust APIs for historical prices, corporate actions, fundamentals, and more, enabling advanced agentic retrieval, RAG, and LLM-powered workflows.
recent_projects.author: Dobri Danchev

recent_projects.name: dialectical-ai
recent_projects.summary: Python SDK for Dialectical AI - Multi-agent conversational AI platform

recent_projects.name: backsub
recent_projects.summary: Channel subtraction scaled by exposure times
